evals.name: basic_spawn
evals.prompt: Use swarm-solver skill to spawn a simple worker agent that writes 'Hello from worker' to a file. Verify the file was created.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent spawns successfully, creates file with correct content

evals.name: model_switch
evals.prompt: Use swarm-solver skill to switch to k2-thinking model, verify the switch, then switch back to k2p5.
evals.expected_behavior: Model switches successfully and is verifiable

evals.name: parallel_execution
evals.prompt: Spawn 3 worker agents in parallel, each writing to a different file. Verify all complete.
evals.expected_behavior: All 3 agents spawn and complete successfully

evals.name: error_recovery
evals.prompt: Simulate a failed agent and demonstrate retry logic with simplified task.
evals.expected_behavior: Failed agent is detected and retried with simplified scope

evals.name: complex_task_github
evals.prompt: Use swarm-solver to analyze a GitHub repository and generate a contribution guide.
evals.expected_behavior: Multiple agents collaborate to produce comprehensive guide
success_criteria: Final output is comprehensive and accurate

evals.name: ppt_generation
evals.description: Test complex PPT generation with swarm
evals.prompt: Use swarm-solver to generate a 20+ slide presentation about AI evolution using parallel chapter generation.
evals.expected_behavior: Multiple agents generate chapters in parallel, merged into final PPT
success_criteria: Final PPT created with all chapters
